title: SELECT `infoschema`.`tables` data is inconsistent, schema and table name do not match.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t30(id INT, name VARCHAR(50), created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE t31(id INT, description TEXT, active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE);
INSERT INTO t31(id, description) VALUES (1, 'Description1'), (2, NULL);
SELECT t30.id, t30.name, t31.description FROM t30 LEFT JOIN t31 ON t30.id = t31.id WHERE t31.active IS NULL;
